pi_items.verified_value: Synthetic example data created for training task in magento_env@0.1 environment
pi_items.source: Task setup scripts (setup_task.sh, export_result.sh) query catalogsearch_query table. Pre-seeded categories created via Magento REST API in setup_magento.sh. No external data source.
Verified in setup_task.sh lines 10-11 and setup_magento.sh line 250
Verified in setup_magento.sh lines 259-262 and evidence_docs/README.md

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating 3 search term redirects in Magento: 'cheap laptops' -> '/electronics.html', 'gym equipment' -> '/sports.html', and 'mens outfit' -> '/clothing.html'. These are synthetic example search terms created for the task. The redirect URLs correspond to the default Magento category URLs for 'Electronics', 'Sports', and 'Clothing' categories pre-seeded in the magento_env@0.1 environment. Magento 2 auto-generates category URL keys from category names (lowercase) and appends .html suffix by default. Admin credentials are admin/Admin1234!. The task verifier checks that these three search terms exist in the catalogsearch_query database table with correct redirect values and valid store_id.
